calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for prove up hearing for a request for default judgment against Defendant Box Restaurant Group, A Corporation, D.B.A. Sneakers American Grill and Defendant Steven Salazar, an individual, and d.b.a. Sneakers Grill.

Dept:505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25:12 a.m. and concluding at 9:39:12 a.m.(D505)

David Julian Cook, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Performance Foods Group, Inc., A Corporation.
Defendant Box Restaurant Group, A Corporation, d.b.a. Sneakers American Grill not appearing.
Defendant Steven Salazar, an individual, and d.b.a. Sneakers Grill not appearing.
Cristin Garden sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's 1st amended complaint for goods sold and delivered and breach of written personal guaranty filed Oct-05-2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Box Restaurant, mailed Oct-27-2023; service effectuated at Nov-06-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Box Restaurant on Dec-28-2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Steven Salazar dba Sneaker Grill mailed on Oct-27-2023; service effectuated at Nov-06-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Steven Salazar dba Sneaker Grill on Dec-28-2023.

Counsel to summarize causes of action and provide offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Court reviews the amounts on the record and the witness confirms it is true.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Declaration
Exhibit B: Invoices
Exhibit C: Personal Guarantee
Exhibit D: Secretary of state information
Exhibit E: liquor license

After reviewing the evidence, hearing the testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff.
The Court grants the following:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendants the following:
Damages $58,358.59
Interest $2,748.56
Attorney's fees $1,000.00
Costs $1,085.00
Total Judgment $63,192.15

Proposed judgment is modified by the Court to comport to proof. Signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
